name: extract-rules-from-url.sh --shape html-sections yields one segment per h2..h6 heading (ADR-0009 line 51)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r01-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule alpha

alpha prose.

Rule beta

beta prose.

Rule gamma

gamma prose.

HTML bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/extract-rules-from-url.sh" --source $OUT/s.html --shape html-sections --source-id r01 --json 2>e.err | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d))' > n.out; N=$(cat n.out); grep -q 'shape=html-sections' e.err && [ "$N" = "3" ] && echo html-sections-yields-segments 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
